heading: Omitted
label: 1351 to 1353 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1351, , , which related to suspension and termination of trade agreement in case of discrimination, was omitted in view of the expiration of the revised agreement between the United States and the Republic of the Philippines which occurred on .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50160 Stat. 155July 4, 1974Section 1352, , , which related to suspension of provisions of subchapter I of this chapter, was omitted on authority of former which nullified subchapter I of this chapter upon the expiration of the revised agreement between the United States and the Republic of the Philippines which occurred on .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50260 Stat. 155section 1345 of this titleJuly 4, 1974Section 1353, , , related to customs duties on imports from Philippines during period subchapter I of this chapter was in effect. See note above for .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50360 Stat. 156section 1352 of this title
